column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="bowing deeply with a shy smile" | TEXT="恐縮です" P2: ACTION/PROPS="placing both hands on heart" | TEXT="痛み入ります" P3: ACTION/PROPS="smiling with a slight blush" | TEXT="もったいないお言葉です" P4: ACTION/PROPS="lowering eyes modestly" | TEXT="身に余る光栄です" P5: ACTION/PROPS="holding both hands together" | TEXT="お心遣いに感謝します" P6: ACTION/PROPS="tilting head with a humble look" | TEXT="おかげさまで" P7: ACTION/PROPS="smiling with a warm gaze" | TEXT="ありがたき幸せ" P8: ACTION/PROPS="bowing at the door" | TEXT="厚く御礼申し上げます" P9: ACTION/PROPS="covering her face slightly with a fan" | TEXT="お恥ずかしい限りです"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="sending a small paper bird" | TEXT="感謝の気持ちです" P2: ACTION/PROPS="standing under a maple tree" | TEXT="温かいお心に触れました" P3: ACTION/PROPS="smiling while wiping a small tear" | TEXT="嬉し涙が溢れます" P4: ACTION/PROPS="holding a small tea snack" | TEXT="どうぞお納めください" P5: ACTION/PROPS="bowing under the moonlight" | TEXT="夢のようでございます" P6: ACTION/PROPS="looking up at someone with gratitude" | TEXT="忘れません" P7: ACTION/PROPS="clasping her hands together" | TEXT="ただただ感謝です" P8: ACTION/PROPS="bowing gracefully in the wind" | TEXT="清々しい気持ちです" P9: ACTION/PROPS="holding a small bell and bowing" | TEXT="恵まれております"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="smiling through a beaded curtain" | TEXT="言葉になりません" P2: ACTION/PROPS="nodding gratefully on a path" | TEXT="励みになります" P3: ACTION/PROPS="shading her eyes and smiling" | TEXT="眩しいほどの優しさです" P4: ACTION/PROPS="standing amidst falling cherry blossoms" | TEXT="ご縁に感謝いたします" P5: ACTION/PROPS="offering a silk scarf" | TEXT="私のまごころです" P6: ACTION/PROPS="smiling near a water fountain" | TEXT="潤いをいただきました" P7: ACTION/PROPS="bowing at a Buddhist altar" | TEXT="日々感謝して" P8: ACTION/PROPS="looking happy in a snowy landscape" | TEXT="心は温かいです" P9: ACTION/PROPS="bowing to a departing guest" | TEXT="よき一日を、感謝と共に"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="holding an incense bag" | TEXT="香りに想いを込めて" P2: ACTION/PROPS="bowing during a tea ceremony" | TEXT="一期一会の感謝" P3: ACTION/PROPS="smiling by a bamboo forest" | TEXT="真っ直ぐな想いを" P4: ACTION/PROPS="shaking hands with a smile" | TEXT="支えられております" P5: ACTION/PROPS="bowing in a karesansui garden" | TEXT="静かなる感謝を" P6: ACTION/PROPS="looking elegant with a butterfly" | TEXT="自由な心をありがとう" P7: ACTION/PROPS="holding a small lantern" | TEXT="道を照らしていただき" P8: ACTION/PROPS="bowing behind a sliding door" | TEXT="お元気で、感謝を込めて" P9: ACTION/PROPS="smiling with a bouquet of iris" | TEXT="誇りに思います"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="shading her face from the sun" | TEXT="日々の恩に報いたい" P2: ACTION/PROPS="holding an open book" | TEXT="学びをありがとう" P3: ACTION/PROPS="standing by a stone bridge" | TEXT="架け橋に感謝" P4: ACTION/PROPS="smiling with a red sun background" | TEXT="輝かしい未来に感謝" P5: ACTION/PROPS="bowing elegantly with a fan" | TEXT="気品を忘れず" P6: ACTION/PROPS="looking out at the sea" | TEXT="広い心に救われました" P7: ACTION/PROPS="holding a silk parasol" | TEXT="守っていただき" P8: ACTION/PROPS="bowing on a boat" | TEXT="豊かな流れに感謝" P9: ACTION/PROPS="smiling at a small shrine" | TEXT="幸運に感謝します"

P1: ACTION/PROPS="smiling through bamboo blinds" | TEXT="秘めたる感謝を" P2: ACTION/PROPS="bowing with a branch of plum" | TEXT="忍耐と感謝を" P3: ACTION/PROPS="shaking her sleeve slightly" | TEXT="幸せが舞い込みます" P4: ACTION/PROPS="standing calmly in the forest" | TEXT="共鳴する心に感謝" P5: ACTION/PROPS="bowing with a calligraphy paper" | TEXT="記しておきます" P6: ACTION/PROPS="looking up at the stars" | TEXT="祈りは天に届きます" P7: ACTION/PROPS="bowing as ason" | TEXT="家名を汚さぬよう" P8: ACTION/PROPS="smiling with a traditional doll" | TEXT="童心を忘れず" P9: ACTION/PROPS="bowing at the final scene" | TEXT="末長いお付き合いを"
